gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A stunning fit Caucasian woman in her mid-20s with a toned athletic physique sits on a carpeted floor. She has highly defined abdominal muscles, thick powerful thighs, and sun-kissed tan skin with realistic pores and a subtle sweat sheen. Large intricate floral tattoos cover her entire right arm and shoulder. Her dirty blonde hair is long, wavy, and slightly messy with backlit strands showing natural shine. Her expression is intimate and self-assured, relaxed and captivating, with confident eyes looking directly at camera and slightly parted lips. She wears a muted grey-blue ribbed crop tank top with thin straps, one strap sliding off her shoulder. A small silver belly button piercing and subtle nose stud are visible. She leans back slightly on one hand in a minimalist room with off-white walls, beige carpet, and white Venetian blinds. Hard sunlight streams through the blinds creating dramatic striped shadows across her body. Low angle perspective focusing on midsection and thighs. No watermark. No artificial smoothing. Realistic texture.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Athletic fit woman mid-20s with defined abs and large floral arm tattoos sitting on floor, dirty blonde wavy hair backlit, wearing muted grey-blue ribbed crop tank with strap sliding off shoulder, sun-kissed tan skin with subtle sweat sheen, confident intimate expression looking at camera, minimalist room with beige carpet and white Venetian blinds, hard sunlight through blinds creating dramatic striped shadow pattern across body, low angle smartphone photography perspective, photorealistic fitness portrait, not over-smoothed or cartoonish
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: Athletic woman with toned physique and defined abs sitting on carpeted floor in minimalist room. She has sun-kissed tan skin with realistic texture, large intricate floral tattoos on right arm and shoulder, dirty blonde wavy hair with backlit shine. Wearing muted grey-blue ribbed crop tank top with thin straps, one sliding off shoulder. Small belly button piercing visible. Her expression is confident and intimate, looking directly at camera. Hard sunlight streams through white Venetian blinds creating dramatic striped shadows across her body. Low angle smartphone perspective focusing on torso and thighs. Warm private atmosphere with beige carpet and off-white walls.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the crop tank top from grey-blue to black while keeping the tattoos and body position the same. Preserve the Venetian blind shadow pattern and low angle perspective.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed body description (abs, thighs), specific tattoo coverage, exact clothing details
2_realism_anchors: 'striped blind shadows', 'defined abs', 'full arm tattoo', 'realistic pores and sheen'
3_technical_camera: 'low angle looking up', 'smartphone aesthetic', 'sharp skin texture', 'shallow DOF'
4_negative_hygiene: prevents over-smoothed skin, cartoonish proportions, messy background
5_spatial_consistency: clear seated pose with camera angle specified
6_lighting_storytelling: 'hard sunlight through Venetian blinds' = dramatic intimate fitness mood
7_shadow_pattern: specific blind shadow stripes as key visual element
